name: Higgsfield
description: AI video and image generation infrastructure with 15+ models (FLUX, Seedance, Kling, Sora 2, Soul) in one workspace.

seo.title: Higgsfield — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Higgsfield: AI video and image generation infrastructure with 15+ models (FLUX, Seedance, Kling, Sora 2, Soul) in one workspace.

when_to_use: Generating cinematic AI video with motion control and physics
Creating marketing video content with controllable camera moves
Producing high-fidelity video animations from text prompts
Building video generation pipelines for creative agencies

pros: Access to 15+ top video/image models in one API
Fast iteration across FLUX, Kling, Sora
cons: Pricing stacks up fast across premium models
Quality varies by underlying model provider
Commercial rights depend on each model's license
review.verdict: A pragmatic aggregator for creatives who need to A/B multiple generative video models.
review.best_for: Creative studios and marketers experimenting with multi-model video AI
review.not_for: Teams standardizing on a single model for deterministic pipelines

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium tier; no explicit peak-lock or reserved-capacity evidence.
